attempted_route: per-feature importance via shap.TreeExplainer on a RandomForestRegressor
observation: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'shap' at import time; script crashes before fitting
rationale: The shap package is absent from the execution environment, so the import fails before any model is fit. This is a dependency/environment failure, not a modelling failure.
recommended_alternative: Use sklearn.inspection.permutation_importance on the fitted RandomForestRegressor (or the model's built-in feature_importances_), both available without extra installs.
